summary: Significant issues: (1) Workflow actions unpinned to commit SHAs (lines 11-12 `actions/checkout@v4`, `setup-bun@v1`—should use full 40-char SHA per task); (2) Missing `permissions:` block for least-privilege; (3) No actionlint validation evidence despite task requirement; (4) Missing test files (*.test.ts) entirely—task mandates red-green TDD with `bun test`, but only one inline fixture in workflow; (5) cleanup.ts has no explanatory comments despite explicit requirement; (6) Policy interaction bug: maxTotalSize re-sorts candidates by date, clobbering earlier keepLatestN filtering; (7) run-act-tests.ts has only 1 hardcoded test case (line 6-14), claims to test multiple cases per task spec. TypeScript itself is reasonably typed, but deliverable is incomplete and insecure.
